tvShow.name: Cape Fear
tvShow.overview: When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.

episodes.name: Fingers & Toes
episodes.overview: After 17 years in prison, Max Cady walks free—and back into the lives of the lawyers who jailed him.

episodes.name: Why Would I Want to Hurt You?
episodes.overview: Desperate to understand what's happening with Zack, Anna and Tom take action. Max settles in.

episodes.name: Phantom Sensations
episodes.overview: Max asks Anna to represent him in a hearing. Tom invites a coworker over. Natalie makes a friend.

episodes.name: Pierced
episodes.overview: Anna leans on Max to help with a new client. Natalie and Amber get closer. Zack offers an apology.

episodes.name: Faith
episodes.overview: Max is visited by someone from his past. Anna investigates Nevaeh. Tom's new case gets complicated.

episodes.name: Possum
episodes.overview: The Bowdens deal with their new neighbor. Natalie begins to question her past. The family takes a trip.

episodes.name: Mongrel
episodes.overview: Anna and Tom kick off a dangerous plot against Max. Seeking answers, Natalie hits the road.

episodes.name: Los tiempos de Dios son Perfectos
episodes.overview: As Max hurls accusations, Anna and Tom go on the offensive. Natalie tries to stop Max.

episodes.name: The Scar
episodes.overview: Anna drives to Cape Fear to find Crystal—and answers. Max gives lethal instructions to Nevaeh.

reviews.author: Emily
reviews.content: Extremely awful accents and really bad acting by the supporting cast. I can't believe they expect people to sit through 10 episodes of this. Just like The Burbs, they have tried to hijack existing IP from a beloved movie and re-make it for the 'modern audience', and they have failed.
